positive: Intricate bioluminescent celestial botanical pattern, featuring glowing moonflowers, starry vines, and abstract lunar crescent elements. The composition is highly detailed and symmetrical, forming a strong, central silhouette ideal for large-scale apparel printing. Style should be a blend of neo-tattoo art, elegant line work, and vibrant watercolor wash accents. Dominant colors are deep indigo, cosmic purple, electric sapphire, accented by brilliant gold stardust and soft cyan glow. High contrast is crucial. The lines must be crisp and clean, suitable for screen printing or DTG transfer, with a delicate, ethereal glow radiating from the flora. Clean pattern repeat, sticker-style clarity, magical, dreamy.
negative: blur, bokeh, noise, grain, sketch, writing, text, signature, watermark, logo, cropped, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, messy lines
